subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of divine love! In these days, through the aid and bounty of the Most Great Oneness, I am waiting for souls to be raised up [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست جام عشق در این ایام بعون و عنایت حضرت احدیت منتظرم که نفوسی مبعوث
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @The Holy Spirit, @call to action, @light and darkness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
